name: 🗡️ BladeForge
description: Live browser idle game with 1k+ players. Procedurally-generated swords, rarity & aura systems, luck-based progression loop, machine-driven property refinement, and clear frontend/backend separation. Highlights: shipped end-to-end, live user metrics, and iterative balance based on player data.
role: Solo full-stack developer - game design, backend, and UI.

name: 🧰 Lootils
description: Production-ready productivity suite (Notes, To-Do, Reminders, Calendar) focused on performance, responsive UX, and robust data modeling. Features full auth, persistent state, offline-friendly behavior, and scale-aware API design.
role: Full-stack owner - architecture, APIs, and interface.

name: 🛠️ skyblock-ts
description: Fully-typed TypeScript SDK for Hypixel SkyBlock. Provides reliable, ergonomic access to auction pagination, profile lookups, and cached endpoints for production integrations - built for other devs to depend on.
role: Author & maintainer - SDK design and documentation.

name: 🧪 HyTools
description: High-performance toolset for SkyBlock players: auction price lookups, gear optimizers, and metadata inspectors built to streamline trading and grinding workflows. Focused on speed, UX, and reliable data handling.
role: Lead developer - performance, UX, and architecture.

name: 🏷️ HyIntel
description: Server-side rendered auction viewer for Hypixel SkyBlock optimized for low-latency browsing. Parses Minecraft color codes into styled HTML, surfaces detailed item lore, and minimizes client JS for fast initial paint.
role: Solo developer - backend, templating, and deployment.

name: 👀 AnimeLens
description: Scalable Discord bot for anime & manga discovery: search, character info, and community commands with Prisma-backed persistence and modular command handling. Built to operate reliably across active servers.
role: Full-stack dev - Discord infrastructure and persistence.

name: ⌨️ Taplytics
description: Typing-test app with words & quotes modes, persistent performance dashboard, and accurate analytics. Showcases frontend polish, lightweight state management, and data visualization for user metrics.
role: Frontend-focused dev - UX, state, and analytics.

name: 🔤 Lordle
description: Experimental Wordle-like prototype with infinite guesses and custom wordlists. Fast prototype demonstrating UI polish, rapid iteration, and front-end craftsmanship.
role: Prototype creator - game design and UI.
